title: Yahir as late CS bloomer
html:
Yahir as late CS bloomer

Stub. Self-frame Yahir uses to interpret his slow-then-fast CS trajectory — minimal exposure pre-OSU, first principles struggle in late 2022, compounding into the 2024 cs ethics / cs 161 coursework arc. Anchors the coursework / osu page narrative.
